description_long: This humanoid robot features an extremely slender and elongated form, with a sharply defined, almost needle-like silhouette. The body appears to be composed of three long, flat, triangular panels that converge at a central vertical axis, giving the robot a minimalist and abstract appearance. The surfaces are smooth and reflective, suggesting a metallic or composite material construction. There are no visible limbs, joints, or facial features, and the overall design is highly geometric and stylized. The robot's structure is rigid and lacks any obvious articulation points or interactive components. Its stark, monochromatic color scheme and sharp edges evoke a futuristic, avant-garde aesthetic.
description: A tall, ultra-slim humanoid robot with three converging triangular panels, smooth metallic surfaces, and a minimalist, abstract design.
description_view_0: The robot is seen from a corner where the three panels meet, emphasizing the sharp convergence and the long, vertical central axis.
description_view_1: This view highlights the flatness and angularity of one of the triangular panels, with the edge sharply defined against the background.
description_view_2: The central vertical axis is most prominent here, with two panels visible extending outward, reinforcing the robot's needle-like form.
description_view_3: Only a flat, featureless surface is visible, showing the smooth, uninterrupted expanse of one panel.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a fully upright, standing pose with its body forming a tall, vertical axis. There are no visible arms, legs, or head, and the panels are symmetrically arranged around the central axis.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, with only integrated, smooth metallic or composite panels forming its exterior. No decorative elements or coverings are present.
attribute_facial_features: No facial features are visible; the robot lacks eyes, mouth, nose, or any expressive elements. The surface is entirely featureless.
attribute_limb_articulation: No limbs or articulation points are visible. The structure appears rigid and monolithic, with no joints or moving parts.
